svg.text: Trained heads shown at full opacity. Greyed heads are architecturally complete but not yet trained — decisions fall through to heuristic AI.
Value network provides advantage baseline for PPO: advantage = game_outcome - value_estimate. All heads share the 512-dim state embedding.
RTX 3080 (10GB) | AMP fp16 | 42MB model | ~51MB VRAM inference | 1,000 games training data | ~153K decision records
